Funnel number two is very powerful. It's a little bit more complicated, but there's a time and a purpose for this as well. If you're just getting started, I wouldn't start with this funnel, but this is one as you're growing can do amazing things for you. So it's called the survey funnel. So this is how a survey funnel works. In fact, yeah, I'll just show you on the slides. Survey funnel is three pages. Actually, it has more than three pages. I messed up there. So this is the survey funnel. So on the first page of survey funnel, you have a survey. Then from there, the goal of the survey is basically this. I'm going to write this down. The reason why survey funnels work great is that the product service you're selling has multiple different markets that may want it. So let's say I'm selling whatever, say I have a course. Let's say the course I'm selling is for, it could be for, say it's for married people. So maybe it's for married people, but it also could be really good for people who are dating. Or maybe it's also really good for parents who are married or no kids. This one's great for with kids or whatever. So different segments that couldn't want your product. But sometimes I sell you the product, I'm pitching you and I have a whole sales video and training where I explain to you why this is such a great thing to do as you're dating. You're like, I'm already married, I don't need to buy this product. You're like, well, it works for you too if you are dating. But you've been pitching me on all the benefits of this. And you said it's really great for you know kids, but I actually have kids. It works for everyone. All of a sudden you're like, it's hard to sell through funnel, right? And there's like different segments of people you're talking to. You can't have the same problem with click phones. It's like somebody comes in my world and they're like, how do I use a funnel? I'm like, well what kind of business do you have? I'm an author, speaker, coach, okay, cool. Well if you're an author, this is how the funnel's I would use. And then someone else is like, well that's cool, but I'm a network marketing. Oh, well if you're network marketing, here's the funnel you should use. And someone else is like, well I'm a local business. I'm like, oh cool, if you're local business. And so there's different segments of the market that I have. And so if I have one funnel speaking to all of them, it can be really difficult to be able to explain to all of them how this works for them specifically. Does that make sense? So that's where SurveyFundal comes in place. Where basically you have this page right here in the middle where you ask some questions. You say, okay, let me ask you some questions. You know, what kind of business do you have? How many employees do you have? What do you do? And you ask them a survey with a bunch of different questions. And from that survey, you're able to figure out are there this kind of person, this kind of person, this kind of person? So the survey goes through and by time it's done, you figure out, okay, this person's a network marketer. So then you redirect them directly to this page. We're like, oh, this person is a coach, I'm gonna redirect to this page. Or this person is something else, you redirect to this page. Because that's basically the process of a SurveyFundal. Is to figure out, of all the traffic you're driving, who is every single person, and then figure out, okay, this is who they are. Now go take them to pages specifically sales to that type of person. And that's the value in this. So like I said, to begin with, it takes a lot of time to put something together. But after you have it, it's amazing, because now you can speak specifically to each person, each customer segment you have, in a way that sells specifically to them. Okay? All right, so let me just kind of walk you through how this funnel, how this funnel works. So this is the old ClickFunnels homepage. We ran this for over a year. And it's still, the survey's still on the homepage, it's just down a little bit lower. But for a year, this is our page, because people always ask me, what kind of funnel work for my business? So we had the whole top block here, be like, okay, ClickFunnels gives you everything you need, let us know what kind of company you have, and we'll be able to tell you which funnel is best for your specific business, okay? And we figured out these are the different segments we had. We had agencies, information product people, e-commerce, coaching, consulting, network marketing, local businesses. So we had all these different people here, right? So somebody would come to that, and they filled out the first step of the survey. And then there's the second question, the third question, the fourth question, the fifth question, we asked a bunch of questions. Okay, now when you're doing a survey like this, typically there's one question, and Ryan Levesque wrote a book called Ask, that kind of teaches this methodology, it's really good. And in his book he talked about, every time you survey like this, there's one question that's the bucket question. And the bucket question is the question to let you know which bucket to put somebody into, okay? And so while I'm asking a bunch of questions, the only one I really care about is my bucket question. The bucket question identifies who they are. The other question is about getting them to engage, and you can think about it, about themselves and their business, and then one question, somewhere that survey is your bucket question. Okay, so you can build these really simply inside of ClickFunnels, obviously, and in there you identify, this is my bucket question, and based on the bucket question, where do you redirect them to, okay? So they come in here, they answer a bunch of questions, after we've figured out, then we have a page right here, and this is the little flashing gift, it's like we are searching for your profile, lulululu, and then it pops out, oh, based on who you are, here you go, here, if you're a network marketer, like this one will pop up, if you say that you're a non-profit, this one's gonna show up, if you're selling information products, this one's gonna show up, okay? And so we've got 10 different variations of this, but based on who the survey tells us you are, you'll land on these pages, you then put your email address in, and you put on a specific email list for that segment, now it will send follow-up emails specifically for network markers, specifically for local business, specifically for non-profits, right? They get the email sequences, and then after they put the email address and then it redirects them to a sales page, that's specifically for them, okay? So if you're a network marketer, you're gonna get an email sequence about network marketing, and you're gonna land on this page right here, in Mindy and Manny talking about how they use, how they use funnels for the network marketing business, okay? If you are a local business, you're gonna pop out, you're gonna see Yanni's video right here, and this is Yanni, who's a painter, talk about how he uses funnels for his painting business, okay? If you're selling information products, boom, you see Yanni's video, talking about how Yanni uses information products, funnels for information products, right? And we did 10 different variations of this, okay, so that's kinda how it works. So if you walk through, here's a survey, finally come here, then they go through the survey, they answer a bunch of questions, we figure out which bucket they fall into, and then based on the bucket, they see one of these landing pages, one of these squeeze pages, they put the email address in, and then boom, they're taken directly to the sales page that speaks specifically to who that person is. That's the magic of a quiz funnel. Do you see how this works? Okay, these are, again, they're simple, but man, they're so, no, I would say they're simple in thought. It takes a while, because for us, we had to write 10 different sales letters, but if you got 10 different email sequences, like it takes a long time, in fact, inside of our company, when we started this project, we called it Project Mother Funnel, because it was such a big project, and so we created the whole thing out, but that's kind of what it is and what it became. So that's how a survey funnel works. So if you start thinking about, as my company's growing, I have more time and energy and resources to be able to create something like this, like what are the different customer segments I need to speak to? And then from there, you can create special sales messages specifically for each one. They opt in here, if you come back to this page right here, the lead funnel's down here, they opt in, and then for us, as soon as they identify which one they're in, then boom, they're moved into a presentation funnel, when I always sell them on the benefits of ClickFunnels. All right, so that's how a survey funnel works. Here's another one, this is one of my favorite ones, this is an acidity quiz. So how acidity is your body? Take the test, you click on the button there, and then boom, actually a bunch of questions, and figure out your age, your weight, how you're eating, and somewhere there's a bucket question, they identify where you fall in, and then boom, it pops out, I'm generating results from there. Cool, we figured out exactly the reports for you, put your email address in here, you put your email address in, and boom, it pops out the entire report for your specific acidity level. And I've taken this quiz like 5,000 times, and every variation has a different sales letter, different thing, different email sequence, and you get redirected based on how you fill out the survey. So that's what a survey funnel is. And hopefully you guys are liking this and geeking out. So how many of you guys want to do a survey funnel now? It's a fun, big, exciting project.
